chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Obligatory for the Traveler on the Journey: Good Companionship, Suppressing Anger, Good Manners, Avoiding Harm, and Piety

text: 2427 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «مَنْ خَالَطْتَ فَإِنِ اِسْتَطَعْتَ أَنْ يَكُونَ يَدُكَ اَلْعُلْيَا عَلَيْهِ فَافْعَلْ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2427 - Muhammad ibn Muslim narrated from Abu Ja‘far (as), who said:
"Whoever you associate with, if you are able to ensure that your hand is above theirs (in generosity and giving), then do so."
